All 3 acceptance criteria for axon-79d1df96 (FEAT-030 audit approval and intent lineage) are satisfied by code merged to master via multiple commits, most recently b630032 ("fix(audit): audit expired intent lineage [axon-79d1df96]") and 96a12e7 ("feat(audit): record intent lineage origin metadata [axon-79d1df96]"). Foundational dep work landed in bf959a2 (axon-6eb7da7f), 348233c (axon-648120e4), 920978b (axon-18fb7517).

Implementation surface:
- crates/axon-audit/src/entry.rs:42-52 MutationType variants for the full lifecycle: IntentPreview, IntentApprove, IntentReject, IntentExpire, IntentCommit (display strings line 71-75).
- crates/axon-audit/src/entry.rs:156 MutationIntentAuditMetadata: intent_id, decision, approval_id, schema_version, subject_snapshot, approver, origin, lineage_links — pre/post images carried by AuditEntry.data_before / data_after.
- crates/axon-audit/src/entry.rs:142 AuditAttribution captures actor, agent/tool identity.
- crates/axon-audit/src/log.rs:319 AuditQuery filters by intent_id; query_paginated is the queryable-by-intent surface.
- crates/axon-audit/src/log.rs:212 query_by_entity is the queryable-by-entity surface.
- crates/axon-api/src/intent.rs:980 emits IntentApprove with full MutationIntentAuditMetadata; intent.rs:1040 emits IntentReject; intent.rs:1893 builds MutationIntentApproverMetadata for approver actor.
- crates/axon-api/src/handler.rs:5054 redact_audit_entry_for_read_with_context applies field-level redactions to entry.data_before and entry.data_after via apply_field_redactions, sourced from the same field_read_redactions logic that drives entity reads — satisfying AC3 (redacted audit reads match entity read redaction).
- crates/axon-api/src/handler.rs:4622 query_audit invokes the redaction on every returned entry.

Tests (passing, cargo test -p axon-audit --lib + cargo test -p axon-api --lib intent):
  AC1 (lineage queryable by intent ID and entity ID):
    axon_audit::log::tests::query_paginated_filters_by_intent_lineage_metadata
    axon_audit::log::tests::query_by_entity_returns_mutations_in_order
    axon_api::intent::tests::expire_due_with_audit_records_intent_lineage
    axon_api::intent::tests::commit_stale_and_mismatch_attempts_are_audited_and_queryable
  AC2 (approvals/rejections include required metadata):
    axon_api::intent::tests::expire_due_with_audit_records_intent_lineage (covers approver, decision, lineage)
    axon_audit::entry::tests serialization tests for MutationIntentAuditMetadata round-trip
  AC3 (redacted audit reads match entity read redaction):
    axon_api::handler::tests::scn_017_intent_audit_reads_redact_commercial_fields_for_contractors

axon-audit lib: 62/62 passing. axon-api intent tests: 29/29 passing including the redaction scenario test. Bead was stuck in needs_human due to four prior codex execute-bead attempts (two with routing failures, two with exit_code=0 but zero diff) while the implementation actually landed via the commits above; closing as already_satisfied.
summary: All 3 ACs covered by tests in axon-audit + axon-api; closing as already_satisfied
